name: portfolio-gallery
description: Personal portfolio and photography gallery — AWS serverless architecture

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build:demo: cd demos/old-portfolio && npm install && CI=false NODE_OPTIONS=--openssl-legacy-provider GENERATE_SOURCEMAP=false npx react-scripts build
scripts.setup: cp -n backend/src/config/develop.example.json backend/src/config/develop.json 2>/dev/null; mkdir -p local-assets/gallery local-assets/certificates local-assets/projects/originals; npm install && echo '\nSetup complete! Edit backend/src/config/develop.json with your credentials, then run: npm run dev'
